alert: Product pages are intermittently slow and cache evictions are spiking.
root_cause: cache eviction storm due to low memory

evidence_descriptions.inspect_logs:cache: Cache logs show repeated eviction storms.
evidence_descriptions.inspect_metrics:cache: Cache metrics show high evictions and degraded hit rate.
evidence_descriptions.inspect_config:cache:MAX_MEMORY_MB: Cache memory limit is below the working set.

expected_action_pattern: resolve_incident(cache eviction storm due to low memory, increase cache memory)
